texto: I wrapped my hands around the familiar cup and tried to draw strength from it. It was from Thea's old Moss Rose set, remnant of careful scrimping and saving in her first year of marriage. Yet the mellow old cup now brought me no comfort, only a feeling of helplessness, of time slipping away. Sunday-best dishes gone to everyday and now to mismatched pieces. Like Thea and me
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lorena McCourtney: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I wrapped my hands around the familiar cup and tried to draw strength from it. It was from Thea's…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, death, old-age pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e luto.

frase_original: I wrapped my hands around the familiar cup and tried to draw strength from it. It was from Thea's old Moss Rose set, remnant of careful scrimping and saving in her first year of marriage. Yet the mellow old cup now brought me no comfort, only a feeling of helplessness, of time slipping away. Sunday-best dishes gone to everyday and now to mismatched pieces. Like Thea and me
